member_question: Is Dr Patel in network for my plan?
resolution_summary: Dr. Anika Patel is in network for BlueCare Choice PPO and is accepting new patients.

member_question: My MRI claim was denied. Why?
resolution_summary: The claim was denied because prior authorization was not obtained before the MRI. Member was directed to appeal instructions.

member_question: I need to change my phone number.
resolution_summary: Phone updates require secure profile verification. Member was routed to the profile update form.

member_question: Can I add my newborn to my plan?
resolution_summary: Birth is a qualifying life event. Member must submit the dependent verification form within the allowed enrollment window.

member_question: What does out of pocket maximum mean?
resolution_summary: The out-of-pocket maximum is the most the member pays for covered services during the plan year.

member_question: Can I see a dermatologist without referral?
resolution_summary: HMO plan members need a PCP referral for dermatology. PPO plan members generally do not.
